title: Nursery Rhyme. XXXII. Literal
content:
[Finis.]

        F for fig, J for jig,
            And N for knuckle bones,
        I for John the waterman,
            And S for sack of stones.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. XXXII. Literal"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
